trustServiceCriteria.category: CC6 - Logical and Physical Access Controls

controls.name: Logical Access Controls
controls.description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets
controls.implementation: Tenant isolation with RLS policies, JWT authentication, service role controls

controls.name: Data Retention
controls.description: The entity discontinues logical and physical protections over physical assets only after the ability to read or recover data and software from those assets has been diminished
controls.implementation: Automated retention policies, legal hold enforcement, scheduled cleanup jobs

controls.name: Audit Logging
controls.description: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from sources outside its system boundaries
controls.implementation: Immutable audit logs, cryptographic integrity, tamper detection

controls.name: Data Classification
controls.description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users and processes
controls.implementation: PII masking, data classification policies, sensitive data protection

controls.name: System Monitoring
controls.description: The entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies
controls.implementation: Deployment monitoring, performance testing, health checks, rollback safety
